description_long: This is a freestanding cardboard display shelf branded with 'Paquito' and decorated with vibrant fruit imagery and green accents. The unit features five open shelves, each with cut-out handles for easy access and product placement. The top of the display has a prominent header sign with the Paquito logo and fruit graphics, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban market setting. The sides are fully printed with fruit images and the slogan 'Le Fruit, Ma Nature,' reinforcing the fresh produce theme. The structure appears lightweight and is likely constructed from corrugated cardboard, making it easy to move and assemble. The open design allows for clear visibility and accessibility of displayed items from the front.
description: A lightweight, freestanding cardboard display shelf with five open tiers, vibrant fruit graphics, and a branded header sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves, cut-out handles, and the prominent Paquito-branded header.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full-height fruit graphics and the 'Le Fruit, Ma Nature' slogan.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the plain cardboard backing and the open structure of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with fruit graphics and branding visible.
